title: Rajani All-Purpose Car Cleaning Brush - Non-Slip Handle, Soft 55mm Bristles, 205mm Overall Length
features: All-Purpose Car Cleaning Brush Non-Slip Handle, Soft 55mm Bristles, 205mm Overall Length
description: All-Purpose Car Cleaning Brush - Non-Slip Handle, Soft 55mm Bristles, 205mm Length All-Purpose Car Cleaning Brush - Non-Slip Handle, Soft 55mm Bristles, 205mm Length Keep your vehicle spotless with the All-Purpose Car Cleaning Brush. Designed for easy handling and effective cleaning, this brush is ideal for wheels, trims, grills, and other hard-to-reach areas. Its soft bristles provide a thorough clean without damaging surfaces—just avoid using it directly on paintwork to prevent scratches. Key Features: Soft 55mm Bristles – Gentle yet effective for cleaning dirt and grime from wheels, trims, grills, and intricate parts. Non-Slip Handle – Ergonomic grip ensures comfort and control, even when wet. Versatile Tool – Suitable for multiple car surfaces, from rims and grills to vents and trims. Durable Construction – Long-lasting design with bristles that retain shape and a sturdy handle for repeated use. Safe on Most Surfaces – Perfect for detailed cleaning, but not recommended for painted surfaces. Product Specifications: Bristle Length: 55mm Overall Length: 205mm Handle: Non-slip ergonomic grip Colour: Black handle with matching bristles (may vary by manufacturer) Material: Synthetic bristles and plastic handle Why Choose This Brush? Make cleaning your car easier and more efficient with this All-Purpose Car Cleaning Brush. Its soft bristles, durable build, and comfortable grip help you tackle stubborn dirt without hassle. A must-have addition to your car care kit for sparkling results every time!
